title: Hashing & HashMaps
story_hook: Finding one student among 10,000 in 0.001 sec - that's hashing.

content.story: Finding one student among 10,000 in 0.001 sec - that's hashing.

content.title: Hashing in DSA
content.focus_note: Watch how hash maps give O(1) lookup.

content.doc_md:
Hashing maps keys to values.

Use it for frequency counting, existence checks, and grouping (anagrams).

visualizer.task: Animate collisions and chaining in a hash table.
visualizer.notes: Observe how keys map to buckets.

practice_problems.prompt: Frequency count of characters in a string.
Check if two strings are anagrams.

quiz_questions.question: HashMap lookup average time is
quiz_questions.explanation: Hash maps use hashing to reach buckets quickly.

quiz_questions.question: Collision means
options: two keys map to same bucket
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: two keys map to same bucket
quiz_questions.explanation: Collisions happen when hash results are identical.

quiz_questions.question: Best use of hashing is
quiz_questions.explanation: Hashing excels at fast existence checks.

content.task_prompt: Build a hash map that counts word frequency in a paragraph.

recall_questions: Why is hashing faster than linear search?
content.identity_affirmation: You now have O(1) lookup superpower.
content.streak_reminder: Linked lists are next - keep the streak alive.
